svg.aria-label: Animated terminal showing: cat /etc/motd, neofetch --ascii_distro svg-terminal, gh api users/octocat/repos --jq '[.[].language] | group_by(.) | …', date +%H:%M:%S, made-with --love
svg.title: Animated terminal showing: cat /etc/motd, neofetch --ascii_distro svg-terminal, gh api users/octocat/repos --jq '[.[].language] | group_by(.) | …', date +%H:%M:%S, made-with --love
svg.desc:
you@svg-terminal:~$ cat /etc/motd SVG-TERMINAL v2026.05 Animated terminals in your README, declarative YAML in. you@svg-terminal:~$ neofetch --ascii_distro svg-terminal dev@svg-terminal OS: TerminalOS v1.0 Shell: bash 5.2 Uptime: a long time Role: Library Author Location: localhost Languages: TypeScript, SVG, SMIL Editor: vim (still trying to exit)
● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● you@svg-terminal:~$ gh api users/octocat/repos --jq '[.[].language] | group_by(.) | …' TypeScript ██████████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 42% Rust ██████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 24% Python ████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 18% Go ███░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 11% Lua █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 5% you@svg-terminal:~$ date +%H:%M:%S uptime 13:37:00 you@svg-terminal:~$ made-with --love built with care you@svg-terminal:~$ palette theme: █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █

g.text: ║ Animated terminals in your README, declarative YAML in. ║
